name: A. MOHAMED YASAR
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer | React.js Architect | MERN Specialist | REST API Expert
summary: Innovative Full Stack Engineer with {{EXPERIENCE}} of expertise in architecting high-fidelity, production-grade web ecosystems using React.js and the MERN stack. Expert at bridging the gap between sophisticated UI/UX requirements and robust backend logic. Proven track record in orchestrating complex REST API integrations, optimizing SQL database performance, and conducting deep-system debugging to maintain 99.9% uptime. Actively expanding technical horizons into Enterprise Java, Spring Boot, and Python-based automation to build the next generation of scalable, secure architecture.
recruiterPitch: I specialize in building scalable MERN stack applications with a focus on high-performance architecture and clean code. Ready to deliver production-grade solutions for complex enterprise challenges.
